/X:APPEARANCE BY RONNIE WAGNER ON BEHALF OF POLICE LEGAL/CAL:OSC FOR RETURN OF PROPERTY/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR, POLICE LEGAL STIPS TO RETURN PROPERTY/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER CARLOS MUSTAFICH/EXHM:PEOPLE'S 1 - BROWN EVIDENCE ENVELOPE; PEOPLE'S 1B - 3X5 PLASTIC BAGGIE MARKED'E2' CONTAINING BLACK TAR-LIKE SUBSTANCE; PEOPLE'S 1C - 8X11 PAPER SFPD CRIME LAB NARCOTICS ANALYSIS REPORT /EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1A - 3X5 PLASTIC BAGGIE MARKED 'E1' CONTAINING BLACK TAR-LIKE SUBSTANCE/ /X:RESPECTIVE COUNSEL STIPULATE TO THE TYPE AND AMOUNT OF DRUG IN PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 1A/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/HTA1:1/DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/

/X:OFFICE OF THE PUBLIC DEFENDER DECLARES CONFLICT,/CON:XAVIER BAEZA/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/ORPJ/NTW/X:DEFENDANT PERSONALLY WAIVES RIGHT TO A PRELIMINARY HEARING TO BE HEARD WITHIN 10 COURT DAYS, BUT DOES NOT WAIVE RIGHT TO A PRELIMINARY HEARING TO BE COMPLETEDWITHIN 60 CALENDAR DAYS,/LD:12-29-08/987,2/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
